allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); countries=set\(e[''''country''''] for e in d\); print\(f''''Total entries: {len\(d\)}''''\); print\(f''''Unique countries: {len\(countries\)}''''\); from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(e[''''country''''] for e in d\); print\(''''Distribution:''''\); [print\(f''''  {k}: {v}''''\) for k,v in c.most_common\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''C:/xampp/htdocs/panoChat/data/places.json''\); console.log\(''Total:'', p.length\); const countries = [...new Set\(p.map\(x=>x.country\)\)]; console.log\(''Paises:'', countries.length\); console.log\(countries.sort\(\).join\('', ''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\(''C:/xampp/htdocs/panoChat/data/places.json''\); console.log\(''Total places:'', p.length\); const countries=new Set\(p.map\(x=>x.country\)\); console.log\(''Unique countries:'', countries.size\); const dupes=p.filter\(\(a,i\)=>p.findIndex\(b=>b.lat===a.lat&&b.lng===a.lng\)!==i\); console.log\(''Duplicate coords:'', dupes.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\(''C:/xampp/htdocs/panoChat/data/places.json''\); console.log\(''Total:'', p.length\); const dupes=p.filter\(\(a,i\)=>p.findIndex\(b=>b.lat===a.lat&&b.lng===a.lng\)!==i\); console.log\(''Duplicados:'', dupes.length\); if\(dupes.length>0\) dupes.forEach\(d=>console.log\(d.lat,d.lng,d.country\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/places.json''\); console.log\(''Total entries:'', d.length\); console.log\(''Valid JSON: yes''\); const dupes = []; for\(let i=0;i<d.length;i++\) for\(let j=i+1;j<d.length;j++\) if\(d[i].lat===d[j].lat && d[i].lng===d[j].lng\) dupes.push\([i+1,j+1,d[i]]\); console.log\(''Duplicate coords:'', dupes.length\); if\(dupes.length\) dupes.forEach\(d=>console.log\(d\)\);")
